en: Ugly, rich and scabby.
No. A farm boy. Poor.
Poor and perfect.
With eyes like the sea after a storm.
ko: 폭풍 후 바다 같은 눈을 가졌어.

en: On the high seas, your ship attacked.
And the dread pirate Roberts never takes prisoners.
ko: 두려운 해적 로버츠는 결코 포로를 잡지 않아.

en: I can't afford to make exceptions.
I mean, once word leaks out that a pirate has gone soft,
people begin to disobey you and then it's nothing but work, work, work all the time.
ko: 사람들은 너에게 반항하기 시작하고, 그러면 항상 일만 하게 돼.

en: You mock my pain!
Life is pain, Highness.
Anyone who says differently is selling something.
ko: 다르게 말하는 사람은 뭔가를 팔고 있어.

en: I remember this farm boy of yours, I think.
ko: 네 농장 소년을 기억하는 것 같아.

en: This would be, what, five years ago?
Does it bother you to hear?
Nothing you can say will upset me.
ko: 네가 뭐라고 해도 나를 불편하게 하진 못해.

en: He died well. That should please you.
ko: 그는 잘 죽었어. 그게 너를 기쁘게 해야 해.

en: No bribe attempts or blubbering.
He simply said, please.
Please, I need to live.
